title: Exit
original_title: ปิด เกม ล่า
overview: A group of students who have gone to visit a carnival at night on a weekend, but feelings of enjoyment have been replaced with feelings of fear. The only way for all 13 of them to survive is to play the most cruel games to pass each stage.
